title: The Dohas of Kabir: The Guest Is Inside
description: Kabir's couplets demolish religious hypocrisy: God is not in the temple or the mosque but within you.
introduction: Kabir's couplets demolish religious hypocrisy: God is not in the temple or the mosque but within you.

translation.text: I laugh when I hear that the fish in the water is thirsty. You wander restlessly from forest to forest while the reality is within your own dwelling.
